Retirement Planning Guides

Free educational resources to help you make informed decisions about your retirement. Expert insights from our team at Capital Wealth Advisors.

Comprehensive Planning Resources

Our guides cover the most important aspects of retirement planning, from 401(k) rollovers to Social Security optimization.

Best Financial Advisor in Lehi Utah 2026

Find the right fiduciary financial advisor in Utah. Learn what questions to ask and red flags to avoid when choosing your retirement planning partner.

Read Guide

How Much Do I Need to Retire in Utah

Calculate your retirement needs based on Utah's cost of living, taxes, and lifestyle considerations. Includes planning worksheets and examples.

Read Guide

401(k) Rollover Complete Guide

Step-by-step guide to rolling over your 401(k) when changing jobs or retiring. Avoid costly mistakes and tax penalties with our expert advice.

Read Guide

When to Take Social Security

Maximize your Social Security benefits with strategic timing. Learn about claiming strategies, spousal benefits, and tax implications.

Read Guide

FERS Retirement Planning Guide

Comprehensive guide for federal employees covered under FERS. Optimize your pension, TSP, and Social Security for maximum retirement income.

Read Guide

Fiduciary vs Commission Advisor

Understand the critical differences between fiduciary and commission-based advisors. Learn why the fiduciary standard matters for your retirement.

Read Guide

Retirement Tax Planning Strategies

Minimize taxes in retirement with strategic withdrawal planning, Roth conversions, and tax-efficient investment placement strategies.

Read Guide

Can I Retire at 62 with $500K

Realistic analysis of retiring with $500,000 at age 62. Explore income strategies, healthcare costs, and lifestyle adjustments to make it work.

Read Guide

Need More Personalized Guidance?

While our guides provide valuable insights, every retirement situation is unique. Our Personalized Retirement Money Map creates a customized strategy based on your specific goals and circumstances.

Comprehensive Analysis

We review your entire financial picture, including investments, taxes, and estate planning.

Fiduciary Standard

As a fee-only fiduciary advisor, we're legally obligated to act in your best interest at all times.

Utah Expertise

Deep knowledge of Utah taxes, regulations, and the unique planning needs of Utah families since 2010.
